narrative:
Jefferson Township has 1,119 registered voters, with 56.8% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 30.7% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 12.5%, a pronounced Republican lean of 18.1 percentage points.
